* [Cetatea Târgu Neamț](/wiki/FC_Ozana_T%C3%A2rgu_Neam%C8%9B "FC Ozana Târgu Neamț") * [Poiana Câmpina](/wiki/FCM_C%C3%A2mpina "FCM Câmpina") * [Dacia Pitești](/wiki/FC_Dacia_Pite%C8%99ti "FC Dacia Pitești") * [Unirea Dej](/wiki/FC_Unirea_Dej "FC Unirea Dej")   **Relegated from [Divizia A](/wiki/1993%E2%80%9394_Divizia_A "1993–94 Divizia A")**   * [Politehnica Timișoara](/wiki/FC_Politehnica_Timi%C8%99oara "FC Politehnica Timișoara") * [Dacia Unirea Brăila](/wiki/ACS_Dacia_Unirea_Br%C4%83ila "ACS Dacia Unirea Brăila") | From Divizia B[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_B&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: From Divizia B")]  **Relegated to [Divizia C](/wiki/1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_C "1994–95 Divizia C")**   * [Foresta Fălticeni](/wiki/Foresta_F%C4%83lticeni "Foresta Fălticeni") * [Metalul Bocșa](/w/index.php?title=AS_Metalul_Boc%C8%99a&action=edit&redlink=1 "AS Metalul Bocșa (page does not exist)") * [Constructorul Iași](/w/index.php?title=Constructorul_Ia%C8%99i&action=edit&redlink=1 "Constructorul Iași (page does not exist)") * [Drobeta-Turnu Severin](/wiki/FC_Drobeta-Turnu_Severin "FC Drobeta-Turnu Severin")   **Promoted to [Divizia A](/wiki/1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_A "1994–95 Divizia A")**   * [Argeș Pitești](/wiki/FC_Arge%C8%99_Pite%C8%99ti "FC Argeș Pitești") * [Maramureș Baia Mare](/wiki/CS_Minaur_Baia_Mare_(football) "CS Minaur Baia Mare (football)") |
*Dacia Unirea Brăila* were deducted 8 points for trying to fix a match and were denied to promote in the first league.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Football league season

[Divizia B](/wiki/Divizia_B "Divizia B")

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Season | 1994–95 |
| Country | [Romania](/wiki/Romania "Romania") |
| Teams | 36 (2x18) |
| Promoted | [Selena Bacău](/wiki/FCM_Bac%C4%83u "FCM Bacău") [Politehnica Timișoara](/wiki/FC_Politehnica_Timi%C8%99oara "FC Politehnica Timișoara") [Politehnica Iași](/wiki/FC_Politehnica_Ia%C8%99i_(1945) "FC Politehnica Iași (1945)") |
| Relegated | [Flacăra Moreni](/wiki/CSM_Flac%C4%83ra_Moreni "CSM Flacăra Moreni") [ICIM Brașov](/w/index.php?title=ICIM_Bra%C8%99ov&action=edit&redlink=1 "ICIM Brașov (page does not exist)") [Faur București](/wiki/Faur_Bucure%C8%99ti "Faur București") [CFR Cluj](/wiki/CFR_Cluj "CFR Cluj") [Acord Focșani](/wiki/CSM_Foc%C8%99ani "CSM Focșani") [Phoenix Baia Mare](/wiki/Phoenix_Baia_Mare "Phoenix Baia Mare") [Callatis Mangalia](/wiki/FC_Callatis_Mangalia "FC Callatis Mangalia") [Armătura Zalău](/wiki/FC_Arm%C4%83tura_Zal%C4%83u "FC Armătura Zalău") |
| Top goalscorer | [Narcis Răducan](/wiki/Narcis_R%C4%83ducan "Narcis Răducan") (18 goals) |
| ← [1993–94](/wiki/1993%E2%80%9394_Divizia_B "1993–94 Divizia B")  [1995–96](/wiki/1995%E2%80%9396_Divizia_B "1995–96 Divizia B") → | |

The **1994–95 Divizia B** was the 55th season of the second tier of the [Romanian football league system](/wiki/Romanian_football_league_system "Romanian football league system").

The format has been maintained to two series, each of them having 18 teams. At the end of the season, the winners of the series promoted to [Divizia A](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") and the last two places from both series relegated to [Divizia C](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III"). The teams which were ranked 2nd played a promotion/relegation play-off against teams ranked 15th and 16th in the [Divizia A](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") and teams ranked 15th and 16th in the [Divizia B](/wiki/Liga_II "Liga II") in both series, played a relegation/promotion play-off against the 2nd places from Divizia C.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

### Renamed teams

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_B&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Renamed teams")]

*Gloria CFR Galați* was renamed as [Constant Galați](/wiki/FCM_Dun%C4%83rea_Gala%C8%9Bi "FCM Dunărea Galați").

*Chimia Râmnicu Vâlcea* was renamed as [FC Râmnicu Vâlcea](/wiki/Chimia_R%C3%A2mnicu_V%C3%A2lcea "Chimia Râmnicu Vâlcea").

Rules for classification: 1) Points; 2) Head-to-head points; 3) Head-to-head goal difference; 4) Head-to-head goals scored; 5) Head-to-head away goals scored; 6) Goal difference; 7) Goals scored.

## Promotion play-off

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_B&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Promotion play-off")]

The 15th and 16th-placed teams of the [Divizia A](/wiki/1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_A "1994–95 Divizia A") faced the 3rd and 2nd-placed teams of the Divizia B. The matches were played on neutral ground, the first one on the [Municipal Stadium](/wiki/Stadionul_Municipal_(Sf%C3%A2ntu_Gheorghe) "Stadionul Municipal (Sfântu Gheorghe)") in [Sfântu Gheorghe](/wiki/Sf%C3%A2ntu_Gheorghe "Sfântu Gheorghe") and the second one on the [Tineretului Stadium](/wiki/Stadionul_Silviu_Ploe%C8%99teanu "Stadionul Silviu Ploeșteanu") in [Brașov](/wiki/Bra%C8%99ov "Brașov").

| Team 1 | Score | Team 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **[Sportul Studențesc](/wiki/FC_Sportul_Studen%C8%9Besc_Bucure%C8%99ti "FC Sportul Studențesc București")** (Div. A) | 1–0 | (Div. B) [Corvinul Hunedoara](/wiki/FC_Corvinul_Hunedoara "FC Corvinul Hunedoara") |
| [Electroputere Craiova](/wiki/FC_Caracal_(2004) "FC Caracal (2004)") (Div. A) | 2–2 ([a.e.t.](/wiki/Extra_time_(association_football) "Extra time (association football)")) (3–4 [p](/wiki/Penalty_shoot-out_(association_football) "Penalty shoot-out (association football)")) | (Div. B) **[Politehnica Iași](/wiki/FC_Politehnica_Ia%C8%99i_(1945) "FC Politehnica Iași (1945)")** |

## Relegation play-off

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_B&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Relegation play-off")]

The 15th and 16th-placed teams of the Divizia B faced the 2nd-placed teams of the [Divizia C](/wiki/1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_C "1994–95 Divizia C"). The matches were played on neutral ground, the first one on the [Municipal Stadium](/wiki/Stadionul_Municipal_(Buz%C4%83u) "Stadionul Municipal (Buzău)") in [Buzău](/wiki/Buz%C4%83u "Buzău"), the second one on the [Astra Stadium](/wiki/Astra_Stadium "Astra Stadium") in [Ploiești](/wiki/Ploie%C8%99ti "Ploiești"), the third one on the [Electro-Precizia Stadium](/wiki/Stadionul_Electro-Precizia "Stadionul Electro-Precizia") in [Săcele](/wiki/S%C4%83cele "Săcele") and the last one on the [Gloria Stadium](/wiki/Stadionul_Jean_P%C4%83dureanu "Stadionul Jean Pădureanu") in [Bistrița](/wiki/Bistri%C8%9Ba "Bistrița").

| Team 1 | Score | Team 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [Faur București](/wiki/Faur_Bucure%C8%99ti "Faur București") (Div. B) | 0–1 | (Div. C) **[Dunărea Călărași](/wiki/FC_Dun%C4%83rea_C%C4%83l%C4%83ra%C8%99i "FC Dunărea Călărași")** |
| [ICIM Brașov](/w/index.php?title=ICIM_Bra%C8%99ov&action=edit&redlink=1 "ICIM Brașov (page does not exist)") (Div. B) | 0–1 | (Div. C) **[ARO Câmpulung](/wiki/ACS_Muscelul_C%C3%A2mpulung "ACS Muscelul Câmpulung")** |
| [Flacăra Moreni](/wiki/CSM_Flac%C4%83ra_Moreni "CSM Flacăra Moreni") (Div. B) | 0–1 | (Div. C) **[FC Onești](/wiki/FCM_Dinamo_One%C8%99ti "FCM Dinamo Onești")** |
| [CFR Cluj](/wiki/CFR_Cluj "CFR Cluj") (Div. B) | 0–0 ([a.e.t.](/wiki/Extra_time_(association_football) "Extra time (association football)")) (1–4 [p](/wiki/Penalty_shoot-out_(association_football) "Penalty shoot-out (association football)")) | (Div. C) **[Olimpia Satu Mare](/wiki/FC_Olimpia_Satu_Mare "FC Olimpia Satu Mare")** |
